properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v7 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Just one drop Would have been enough It would have been enough But You gave it all There upon the cross To demonstrate Your love

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You saved me before I knew I was lost And I can't repay You for that cost

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All that I am is Yours All of my days I live to worship My life is not my own I lay it down, this heart surrendered

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There is no greater love There is no greater love

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Just one touch Would have been enough It would have been enough But You’re reaching out With everything You are That's just who You are

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There is no greater love There is no greater love There is no greater love There is no greater love

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Just one drop would have been enough Just enough was never the point of Your love You gave until there was nothing left Now I will worship You with every breath
